# AutoLoop v0.1.1

Patch release focused on checker maintainability, Markdown parsing robustness, and coordinator work-order sizing guidance.

## Added

- Shared checker value helpers for board statuses and worker-report strict values.
- Tests that pin shared checker values and parser boundary behavior.
- Right-sized work-order guidance in public prompts and templates.
- Explicit brownfield pass-through support in the coordination-state summary wrapper.
- Controlled `integration-bringup` work-order template guidance for manual deploy/start/trigger/observe/classify loops.

## Fixed

- Strict worker-report verification parsing now handles command cells containing pipeline characters more reliably.

## Boundary

- Source-only release.
- No package, binary, daemon, GUI, automatic dispatch, autonomous execution, deployment, merge, rollback, credential handling, hardware handling, or production behavior.
